completed_tasks.name: Disable slash + proficiency bar animations on mobile

decisions.decision: useReducedMotion initial state reduced instead of full
decisions.rationale: Prevents mobile flashing desktop animations before useEffect runs

decisions.rationale: IK/recruiter friendly — Temiz kod güçlü sistemler / Clean code resilient systems

decisions.rationale: User wanted to showcase this portfolio site as a project

decisions.decision: SVG favicon with EK monogram (gold on dark)
decisions.rationale: Replaces default Next.js icon, matches site branding

next_action: v1.0 complete. Options: new milestone (blog, contact form, analytics), Lighthouse audit, or new project entirely.
